title: Roman Nepali: udhaar = credit sale/receivable
content: Roman Nepali 'Ram lai udhaar diye' / 'udhaar ma becheko' = credit sale. Party receives goods now, pays later. Journal: Dr Debtors (Ram), Cr Sales. NOT the same as 'udhaar tiryo' (payment received).

title: Roman Nepali: kharcha = expense
content: Kharcha (खर्च) = business expense that reduces profit/equity. Examples: talab, bhada, bijuli, marketing. Kharcha is NOT sampatti (asset). Journal: Dr Expense, Cr Cash/Bank/Creditor.

title: Roman Nepali: VAT sahit
content: 'VAT sahit' / '13% sahit' means the stated amount INCLUDES 13% VAT. Split: net = gross / 1.13, VAT = gross - net.
